title: All About Me
description: Module One — Self: greetings and introductions, family and possession with have got, ages and numbers, hobbies with like/love/enjoy, daily routines in the simple present with adverbs of frequency, telling the time and the prepositions at/in/on
sources: Let's Learn English — 7th year Basic Education, Teacher's Book (CNP 541702) — Module One
English Programme for Basic Education, Ministry of Education, Tunisia (March 2005)
